name: think-all-in-one
description: Monorepo scaffold for a Think assistant web app and Cloudflare Worker backend.

scripts.web: sh -c '[ -d apps/web ] && npm --prefix apps/web run dev || echo "apps/web is not scaffolded yet"'
scripts.worker: sh -c '[ -d worker ] && npm --prefix worker run dev || echo "worker is not scaffolded yet"'
scripts.test: sh -c 'status=0; if [ -d worker ]; then npm --prefix worker run test || status=$?; fi; if [ -d apps/web ]; then npm --prefix apps/web run test || status=$?; fi; exit $status'
scripts.typecheck: sh -c 'status=0; if [ -d worker ]; then npm --prefix worker run typecheck || status=$?; fi; if [ -d apps/web ]; then npm --prefix apps/web run typecheck || status=$?; fi; exit $status'
scripts.deploy: sh -c '[ -d worker ] && npm --prefix worker run deploy || echo "worker is not scaffolded yet"'
